message:
feat(error): add ConfigError variant to ErrorKind

Introduce ErrorKind::ConfigError for configuration-related failures
(invalid environment variables, malformed config files, missing
required settings). Classified as:
- ErrorCategory::User (configuration is user-provided input)
- Recoverability::Permanent (bad config won't fix itself)
- RecoveryAction::Propagate (surface to caller for correction)

This supports the new env_config module which needs a typed error
variant for configuration validation failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
